subject: AP Computer Science Principles
notes: Current written-response practice is limited to official AP Central 2024/2025 released prompts with scoring guidelines.
2016 and 2018 local practice exams each contain 74 historical MCQ items; Web mock uses 70 MCQ to align with the current end-of-course MCQ count.
CSP code, data tables, multiple-select MCQ, and Create written responses require subject-specific rendering and review.
2026 released CSP prompts are excluded from scored practice until matching scoring guidelines are available in the source pack.

2026-07-12: Reclassified CSP MCQ using AP CSP Big Idea learning progression; U1 remains underrepresented in local MCQ source material and requires supplemental coverage before full unit practice parity.
2026-07-12: Student-progression contract tightened: all curriculum units are checked, CSP network/impact items reclassified, and broad program-keyword rule narrowed.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Computer Science Principles Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
